final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: illustration-artwork
Asset type: traditional Chinese scroll painting, panoramic composition
Primary request: elaborate "Hundred Birds Worshipping the Phoenix" scene in gongbi heavy-color style
Scene/backdrop: ethereal immortal mountain landscape with misty clouds and rosy dawn glow, ancient pines and cypresses, exotic flowers and rare plants scattered throughout
Subject: a pair of phoenixes at center with wings spread soaring through clouds - male phoenix with vermilion red, golden yellow, and emerald green plumage; female phoenix with pink-purple, silver-white, and cyan-blue feathers, both responding to each other. Surrounded by dozens of rare birds: peacocks with fanned tails, dancing cranes, golden pheasants foraging, playful parrots, each bird in distinct lifelike poses
Style/medium: traditional Chinese gongbi heavy-color painting (工笔重彩), meticulous brushwork with fine flowing lines, rich and gorgeous colors, gold powder outlining feather details
Composition/framing: panoramic scroll format, phoenixes as central focal point with birds radiating outward in layered depth
Lighting/mood: soft diffused celestial light through cloud layers, auspicious and majestic atmosphere
Color palette: vermilion red, golden yellow, emerald green, pink-purple, silver-white, cyan-blue, with gold accents on feathers
Materials/textures: silk scroll texture, mineral pigment saturation, delicate feather rendering with individual strand details, metallic gold linework
Constraints: maintain traditional Chinese painting aesthetics, phoenix pair must be central and prominent, all birds must be identifiable species with accurate anatomy
Avoid: Western realistic shading, photographic depth of field, modern digital effects, anachronistic elements, cartoon simplification
